    // Constraints: 1 <= nums[i] <= 10^5
    const MAX_VAL = 100000;

    // Step 1 & 2: Identify all unique initial values present in nums.
    // Using an array for O(1) lookup since max value is small.
    const isInitial = new Array(MAX_VAL + 1).fill(false);
    for (const x of nums) {
        if (x <= MAX_VAL) {
            isInitial[x] = true;
        }
    }

    let totalSum = 0;

    // Step 3: For each element x in nums, find the smallest divisor v that is in the initial set.
    for (const x of nums) {
        let minDivisor = x; // Initialize with x itself (since x is always divisible by x, and x is in isInitial)

        // Find all divisors of x in O(sqrt(x)) time.
        const limit = Math.floor(Math.sqrt(x));
        
        for (let d = 1; d <= limit; d++) {
            if (x % d === 0) {
                // Check divisor d
                if (isInitial[d]) {
                    minDivisor = Math.min(minDivisor, d);
                }
                
                // Check conjugate divisor d' = x / d
                const dPrime = x / d;
                if (isInitial[dPrime]) {
                    minDivisor = Math.min(minDivisor, dPrime);
                }
            }
        }
        
        totalSum += minDivisor;
    }

    return totalSum;
}
```
